versions.label: BSB
paragraphs: 21 Do not set up any wooden Asherah pole next to the altar you will build for the LORD your God, 22 and do not set up for yourselves a sacred pillar, which the LORD your God hates.

context_lines: In **Deuteronomy 16**, this section should be read within the flow of the chapter and the larger movement of Deuteronomy.
common_interpretation_lines: A common reading of **Forbidden Forms of Worship** is that it should be interpreted in light of the chapter's full narrative movement rather than as an isolated proof text.
Where interpreters differ on details, the immediate setting in **Deuteronomy 16** remains the first control on meaning.
